title: POV：全自動化 AI 小編跟廣告
title_en: POV: AI editor + ads on autopilot

subtitle.safe_area_note: Title and subtitles stay away from Instagram Reels top and bottom UI.
subtitle.mixed_language_spacing_rule: When Chinese characters and ASCII letters/digits sit next to each other, always insert exactly one space between them (applies to subtitles, title, and cover copy).
subtitle.line_gap_note: Extra vertical space between line 1 and line 2 of a wrapped subtitle so two-line captions breathe instead of stacking tight.
subtitle.no_overlap_note: Each subtitle is forced to end (min_gap_seconds) before the next one starts so an old line is never on screen while a new one paints.

editing.silence_tuning_note: Chinese-tuned: -42 dB threshold + 0.55s minimum stops the detector from clipping syllable tails (Tone 3 dipping endings, -n/-ng nasal releases). Combined with build_pieces cut_start +0.28s and cut_end -0.28s, only true pauses >0.74s get trimmed and 280ms of audio is preserved on each side.
editing.opening_trim_reason: Skip autofocus pulls and lens warm-up frames (typically up to ~1.5–2s on iPhone selfies) so the first second of the Reel is crisp.

performance.note: Two-model pipeline on Apple Silicon arm64: (a) mlx-community/whisper-large-v3-turbo for fast ZH transcription (~25s on 3-min audio), (b) mlx-community/whisper-medium-mlx with task='translate' for ZH->EN (~98s, but quality is dramatically better than dedicated NMT models like Marian opus-mt or NLLB-200-600M on talking-head content). Both download from HF on first run, cached in ~/.cache/huggingface. Intel/Windows fall back to Systran/faster-whisper-large-v3-turbo + bundled Marian.

export.target_note: CRF 22 keeps faces crisp at 720x1280. Bitrate target / -tune / forced -g all break the first second of the Reel because the first concat piece is sub-1s, so we keep the encoder in pure CRF mode.

editorial.description_zh: 白字加黃色重點，最像知識型 Reels 封面。
editorial.description_en: White type with yellow emphasis for knowledge-style Reels.

creator.description_zh: 留更多臉部空間，字體更乾淨，適合個人品牌。
creator.description_en: More face space and cleaner typography for personal brands.

high_contrast.description_zh: 更強陰影和底部 hook，適合想提高停留率。
high_contrast.description_en: Stronger contrast and bottom hook for scroll-stopping thumbnails.
